discoverable.label: Discoverable
discoverable.hint: Is this Actor discoverable as a Creature or Character in the Ember Codex?

ancestry.label: Ancestry
ancestry.hint: An Ancestry item ID or Ember ancestry name.

culture.label: Culture
culture.hint: A Culture item ID or Ember culture name.

path.label: Path
path.hint: A custom string that describes this character's profession or background.

flip.label: Flip Horizontal
flip.hint: Portraits should be either front-facing or left-facing. If a portrait is illustrated in a way that is right-facing, check this box to flip it in Vistas.

pronunciation.label: Pronunciation
pronunciation.hint: A phonetic guide for how to pronounce this character's name.

combatTheme.label: Combat Theme
combatTheme.hint: Configure this creature or character to prefer a combat theme that is not standard for their category.

WARNINGS.IMPORT_REQUIRED: The Ember module is active, but its content is not yet imported. Import the Ember adventure to continue.
WARNINGS.IMPORT_UNDERWAY: Ember import in progress, please wait patiently. When complete, the game will automatically reload.
WARNINGS.REIMPORT_REQUIRED: You must reimport the Ember adventure to include critical updates in Ember version {version}.
WARNINGS.EVENT_ACTIVE: You must conclude or cancel your currently active Ember game event before importing the adventure.

EMBER.ATTUNEMENT.IdentifierHint: A unique string that identifies this specific attunement award.

color.label: UI Color
color.hint: A color used as a design element to depict this Ancestry in the character creation UI.

icon.label: Ancestry Icon
icon.hint: An icon used to represent this Ancestry in character creation and elsewhere.

item.label: Ancestry Race Item
item.hint: The D&D5E game system race item.

height.label: Height
height.hint: Define the typical height for adults of this Ancestry.

lifespan.label: Lifespan
lifespan.hint: Define the typical lifespan for this Ancestry.

origin.label: Ancestry Origin
origin.hint: Briefly describe the cosmological origin of the ancestry. For internal notes only.

portrait.label: Portrait
portrait.hint: A portrait of an example character of this Ancestry.

rarity.label: Rarity
rarity.hint: Define the rarity tier of this Ancestry.

biomeId.label: Biome ID
biomeId.hint: A required unique identifier for the biome. This identifier must match exactly the one configured in the backend region data.

creatures.label: Creatures
creatures.hint: Configure the creatures which inhabit this biome by entering an Actor UUID or using drag-and-drop.

coefficients.label: Event Coefficients
coefficients.hint: Configure coefficients and weights which inform the probability of events occurring in this biome.

exposition.label: Setting the Scene
exposition.hint: Readaloud text which provides exposition when first discovering the Biome. This introductory text is visible to both Gamemaster and Players.

fillColor.label: Color
fillColor.hint: The color used to represent this Biome on the region map.

overview.label: Biome Overview
overview.hint: A paragraph (or more) of player-facing overview about the Biome.

regionId.label: Region ID
regionId.hint: Configure which region of the Ember game world where this location exists.

area.label: Area Map
area.hint: Designate an Area Map which is used to represent this Biome.

vista.label: Vista
vista.hint: Designate a Vista which is used to represent this Biome.

soundscape.label: Environment Soundscape
soundscape.hint: Configure the soundscape and arrangements used by default for environmental ambience within this Biome.

surface.label: Surface Substance
surface.hint: The surface substance ID used when determining region map travel sound.

soundscape.label: Music Soundscape
soundscape.hint: Configure the soundscape and arrangements used for game music within this Biome.

terrain.label: Terrain
terrain.hint: Designate the default terrain type of hexes in this Biome.

limit.label: Limit
limit.hint: How does visibility get restricted when encountering hexes of this Biome?

color.label: UI Color
color.hint: A color used as a design element to depict this class in the character creation UI.

icon.label: Class Icon
icon.hint: An icon used to represent this class in character creation and elsewhere.

overview.label: Class Overview
overview.hint: A paragraph of summary information about the class which is displayed in character creation.

color.label: UI Color
color.hint: A color used as a design element to depict this Culture in the character creation UI.

icon.label: Culture Icon
icon.hint: An icon used to represent this Culture in character creation and elsewhere.

item.label: Culture Background Item
item.hint: The D&D5E game system background item.

color.label: UI Color
color.hint: A color used as a design element to depict this Cosmological attunement in the character creation UI.

icon.label: Icon
icon.hint: An icon used to represent this Cosmological attunement in character creation and elsewhere.

item.label: Background Item
item.hint: The D&D5E game system background item.

portrait.label: Portrait Image
portrait.hint: An image used to represent the cosmological element in character creation and elsewhere.

banner.label: Deity Banner
banner.hint: A banner image depicting the deity or other reference materials related to the deity.

caption.label: Banner Caption
caption.hint: An optional caption displayed beneath the banner image.

pronunciation.label: Pronunciation
pronunciation.hint: An optional phonetic pronunciation for the name of this Deity.

category.label: Category
category.hint: Define the sidebar category that this deity entry should be organized under.

edict.label: Edict
edict.hint: Provide a one-sentence edict that summarizes this deity's mandate or goals.

overview.label: Deity Overview
overview.hint: Provide a brief (2-3 sentence) overview of the Deity, their cosmological role, and core tenets.

organizations.label: Related Organizations
organizations.hint: Organizations of the world which have a notable relationship with this deity.

locations.label: Notable Locations
locations.hint: Locations in the world which have a notable relationship with this deity.

followers.label: Notable Followers
followers.hint: Associated characters or creatures which are notable followers of this deity.

clerics.label: Divine Domains
clerics.hint: Divine Domains which are typically associated with this deity, if any. Clerics who worship this deity usually practice one of these domains.

warlocks.label: Warlock Pacts
warlocks.hint: Warlock Pacts which are typically associated with this deity, if any. Warlocks who are granted power by this deity adhere to one of these pacts.

sorcerers.label: Sorcerous Origins
sorcerers.hint: Sorcerous Origins which are typically associated with this deity, if any. Sorcerers with these origins of their power may attribute it to this deity.

status.label: Development Status
status.hint: Record the current development status of this content.

notes.label: Development Notes
notes.hint: Leave short notes that explain the current development status or next steps. URLs are supported.

secrets.label: Secret Lore
secrets.hint: Additional world-building or setting compendium information about this topic which is not intended for public (either GM or player) knowledge.

biomes.label: Event Biomes
biomes.hint: Configure this event to occur in all hexes belonging to a certain set of biomes.

coefficients.label: Event Coefficients
coefficients.hint: Configure coefficients and weights which inform the probability of this event occurring. This is an advanced configuration and should be done only with caution and understanding of how the event probability engine works.

eventId.label: Event ID
eventId.hint: A required unique identifier for the event. By convention this event ID should be alphanumeric, camel-case, and begin with a lowercase letter. For example "myStandaloneEvent3".

encounter.label: Encounter Configuration
encounter.hint: Encounter configuration is an advanced feature and should only be done cautiously and in consultation with Andrew.

global.label: Global
global.hint: Global events may occur in any and every hex in the world.

hexes.label: Specific Hexes
hexes.hint: Configure this event to occur in a set of specific hex coordinates.

type.label: Event Type
type.hint: Indicate the primary gameplay type of this event. Currently, you may only choose one type but in the future you will be able to tag multiple gameplay themes.

locations.label: Event Locations
locations.hint: Configure this event to occur in a specific set of locations.

milestone.label: Awards Milestone
milestone.hint: Indicate whether this quest event awards a milestone point upon completion.

prerequisite.label: Prerequisite
prerequisite.hint: Configure the prerequisite state of parent events that is required for this event to be unlocked.

regionId.label: World Region
regionId.hint: Configure which region of the world this event takes place in.

scene.label: Active Scene
scene.hint: Configure which Scenes should be used for this event.

id.label: Active Scene
id.hint: This Scene becomes active when this Event is started. If blank, the event will take place within the current Scene rather than switching to a different one.

id.label: Complete Scene
id.hint: This Scene becomes active when this Event is completed. If blank, the Scene which was previously active before the start of the Event will be activated.

unique.label: Unique
unique.hint: Unique events will only occur once, otherwise this event may repeat.

overview.label: At a Glance
overview.hint: A brief (1-2 sentence) introduction which is visible only to the Gamemaster that summarizes what gameplay will occur during the event.

exposition.label: Setting the Scene
exposition.hint: Readaloud text which provides exposition to the event. This introductory text is visible to both Gamemaster and Players.

summary.label: Journal Summary
summary.hint: Provide a brief (1-3 sentence) log entry that will record this event in the campaign manager after it has been completed. This should be written from the perspective of the party in 1st-person plural, for example "We encountered a strange traveler on the road ..."

MESSAGES.CHANGE_OUTCOME: Are you sure you want to {action} the {label} outcome?

creatures.label: Creatures
creatures.hint: Configure the creatures which inhabit this location by entering an Actor UUID or using drag-and-drop.

coefficients.label: Event Coefficients
coefficients.hint: Configure coefficients and weights which inform the probability of events occurring in this location.

discoveryHexes.label: Discovery Hexes
discoveryHexes.hint: Hexes other than ones where this location exists from which the location will be discovered.

exposition.label: Setting the Scene
exposition.hint: Readaloud text which provides exposition when first discovering the Location. This introductory text is visible to both Gamemaster and Players.

locationId.label: Location ID
locationId.hint: A required unique identifier for the location. By convention this location ID should be alphanumeric, camel-case, and begin with a lowercase letter. For example "myCustomLocation4".

overview.label: Location Overview
overview.hint: A paragraph (or more) of player-facing overview about the Location.

regionId.label: Region ID
regionId.hint: Configure which region of the Ember game world where this location exists.

hexes.label: Specific Hexes
hexes.hint: Configure the set of hexes where this location exists.

area.label: Area Map
area.hint: Designate an Area Map which is used to represent this Location.

vista.label: Vista
vista.hint: Designate a Vista which is used to represent this Location.

soundscape.label: Environment Soundscape
soundscape.hint: Configure the soundscape and arrangements used by default for environmental ambience within this Location.

neighbors.label: Neighbors
neighbors.hint: When at this location on the region map, include environment layers from neighboring hexes?

soundscape.label: Music Soundscape
soundscape.hint: Configure the soundscape and arrangements used for game music within this Location.

terrain.label: Terrain
terrain.hint: Designate the terrain type of hexes in this Location.

limit.label: Limit
limit.hint: How does visibility get restricted for hexes in this Location?

img.label: Banner Image
img.hint: A banner image displayed at the header of the page for this topic.

caption.label: Banner Caption
caption.hint: An optional caption displayed beneath the banner image.

overview.label: Topic Overview
overview.hint: A brief (2-3 sentence) overview of this lore topic that summarizes its content.

gamemaster.label: Gamemaster-Only Information
gamemaster.hint: Additional information about this topic which is only revealed to Gamemaster users.

identifier.label: Topic Identifier
identifier.hint: The unique identifier string used for this Lore topic.

pronunciation.label: Pronunciation
pronunciation.hint: An optional phonetic pronunciation for the name of this topic.

subtitle.label: Secondary Title
subtitle.hint: A subtitle, secondary title, moniker, or epithet that is used to refer to this topic.

concepts.label: Related Concepts
concepts.hint: Related concepts (Journal pages) which are associated with this topic.

characters.label: Related Characters
characters.hint: Related characters (Actors) which are associated with this topic.

banner.label: Banner Image
banner.hint: A optional banner image used to depict this Organization.

caption.label: Banner Caption
caption.hint: An optional caption displayed beneath the banner image.

pronunciation.label: Pronunciation
pronunciation.hint: An optional phonetic pronunciation for the name of this Organization.

color.label: UI Color
color.hint: A color used as a design element to associate with this Organization.

icon.label: Organization Icon
icon.hint: An icon used to represent this Organization.

locations.label: Locations
locations.hint: Related locations (Gazetteer pages) which are associated with this Organization.

overview.label: Organization Overview
overview.hint: Provide a brief (2-3 sentence) overview of the Organization that summarizes its role and background.

characters.label: Characters
characters.hint: Related characters (Actors) which are associated with this Organization.

questId.label: Quest ID
questId.hint: A required unique identifier for the quest. The quest ID should be alphanumeric, camel-case, and begin with a lowercase letter. For example "specialQuest3".

regionId.label: Region ID
regionId.hint: Configure which region of the game world this Quest is primarily associated with.

color.label: Quest Color
color.hint: Choose a color to represent this quest in the region map legend and campaign manager.

overview.label: At a Glance
overview.hint: A one paragraph overview of the quest which is visible only to the Gamemaster that summarizes the primary gameplay elements and themes of the quest.
